security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: asset:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Radiology informatics toolkit: template mapper, HL7 viewer, utilities.
bundle.longDescription: A lightweight desktop application combining dictation template mapping, HL7 message viewing and de-identification, string generation, tool launching, and an integrated terminal.
